$.searchText: One of my first tasks: make it possible for AI to edit documents across the platform create swarms of agents to come in and attack your documents with requested changes while you are mid edit and have no way to stop them.

op.match: warms of agents to come in and attack your documents with requested changes while you are mid edit and have no way to stop them

op.text: In this blog I talk about how we implemented AI Editing part 2.0, with a “team” of agents that cooperate to make targeted concurrent edits to your document to fulfill requests. It’s magical, fun, and you can try it out yourself at Macro.com!

I recently started at Macro.com, working on our open source supertool that brings together the best of productivity tools like Obsidian, Linear, and Slack, into a sweet, unified platform that’s delightful to use.
